   147→
   148→**Helm Application:**
   149→```yaml
   150→apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
   151→kind: Application
   152→metadata:
   153→  name: myapp-helm
   154→  namespace: argocd
   155→spec:
   156→  project: production
   157→
   158→  source:

   167→      parameters:

   172→      values: |

   178→  destination:

   181→
   182→  syncPolicy:

   184→      prune: true

   186→    syncOptions:

   189→
   190→**Kustomize Application:**
   191→```yaml
   192→apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
   193→kind: Application
   194→metadata:
   195→  name: myapp-kustomize
   196→  namespace: argocd
   197→spec:
   198→  project: production
   199→
   200→  source:
   201→    repoURL: https://github.com/myorg/myapp
   202→    targetRevision: main

   204→    kustomize:

   206→      nameSuffix: -v2

   223→
   224→### AppProject
   225→
   226→**Project with RBAC:**
   227→```yaml
   228→apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
   229→kind: AppProject
   230→metadata:
   231→  name: production
   232→  namespace: argocd
   233→spec:
   234→  description: Production applications
   235→
   236→  # Source repositories
   237→  sourceRepos:
   238→  - https://github.com/myorg/*
   239→  - https://charts.bitnami.com/bitnami
   240→
   241→  # Destination clusters and namespaces
   242→  destinations:
   243→  - namespace: production
   244→    server: https://kubernetes.default.svc
   245→  - namespace: monitoring
   246→    server: https://kubernetes.default.svc
   247→
   248→  # Cluster resource whitelist
   249→  clusterResourceWhitelist:
   250→  - group: '*'
   251→    kind: '*'
   252→
   253→  # Namespace resource blacklist
   254→  namespaceResourceBlacklist:
   255→  - group: ''
   256→    kind: ResourceQuota
   257→  - group: ''
   258→    kind: LimitRange
   259→
   260→  # RBAC roles
   261→  roles:
   262→  - name: developer
   263→    description: Developers can sync apps
   264→    policies:
   265→    - p, proj:production:developer, applications, sync, production/*, allow
   266→    - p, proj:production:developer, applications, get, production/*, allow
   267→    groups:
   268→    - developers
   269→
   270→  - name: admin
   271→    description: Admins have full access
   272→    policies:
   273→    - p, proj:production:admin, applications, *, production/*, allow
   274→    groups:
   275→    - platform-team
   276→
   277→  # Sync windows
   278→  syncWindows:
   279→  - kind: allow
   280→    schedule: '0 9 * * 1-5'  # 9 AM weekdays
   281→    duration: 8h
   282→    applications:
   283→    - '*'
   284→  - kind: deny
   285→    schedule: '0 0 * * 0,6'  # Weekends
   286→    duration: 24h
   287→    applications:
   288→    - '*'
   289→
   290→  # Orphaned resources
   291→  orphanedResources:
   292→    warn: true
   293→```
   294→
   295→### ApplicationSet
   296→
   297→**Git Generator (Multi-Environment):**
   298→```yaml
   299→apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
   300→kind: ApplicationSet
   301→metadata:
   302→  name: myapp-environments
   303→  namespace: argocd
   304→spec:
   305→  generators:
   306→  - git:
   307→      repoURL: https://github.com/myorg/myapp
   308→      revision: main
   309→      directories:
   310→      - path: k8s/overlays/*
   311→
   312→  template:
   313→    metadata:
   314→      name: 'myapp-{{path.basename}}'
   315→    spec:
   316→      project: production
   317→      source:
   318→        repoURL: https://github.com/myorg/myapp
   319→        targetRevision: main
   320→        path: '{{path}}'
   321→      destination:
   322→        server: https://kubernetes.default.svc
   323→        namespace: '{{path.basename}}'
   324→      syncPolicy:
   325→        automated:
   326→          prune: true
   327→          selfHeal: true
   328→```
   329→
   330→**List Generator (Multi-Cluster):**
   331→```yaml
   332→apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
   333→kind: ApplicationSet
   334→metadata:
   335→  name: myapp-clusters
   336→  namespace: argocd
   337→spec:
   338→  generators:
   339→  - list:
   340→      elements:
   341→      - cluster: us-east-1
   342→        url: https://cluster1.example.com
   343→        namespace: production
   344→      - cluster: us-west-2
   345→        url: https://cluster2.example.com
   346→        namespace: production
   347→      - cluster: eu-central-1
   348→        url: https://cluster3.example.com
   349→        namespace: production
   350→
   351→  template:
   352→    metadata:
   353→      name: 'myapp-{{cluster}}'
   354→    spec:
   355→      project: production
   356→      source:
   357→        repoURL: https://github.com/myorg/myapp
   358→        targetRevision: main
   359→        path: k8s/overlays/production
   360→      destination:
   361→        server: '{{url}}'
   362→        namespace: '{{namespace}}'
   363→      syncPolicy:
   364→        automated:
   365→          prune: true
   366→          selfHeal: true
   367→```
   368→
   369→**Matrix Generator (Environments × Clusters):**
   370→```yaml
   371→apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
   372→kind: ApplicationSet
   373→metadata:
   374→  name: myapp-matrix
   375→  namespace: argocd
   376→spec:
   377→  generators:
   378→  - matrix:
   379→      generators:
   380→      - git:
   381→          repoURL: https://github.com/myorg/myapp
   382→          revision: main
   383→          directories:
   384→          - path: k8s/overlays/*
   385→      - list:
   386→          elements:
   387→          - cluster: prod-us
   388→            url: https://prod-us.example.com
   389→          - cluster: prod-eu
   390→            url: https://prod-eu.example.com
   391→
   392→  template:
   393→    metadata:
   394→      name: 'myapp-{{path.basename}}-{{cluster}}'
   395→    spec:
   396→      project: production
   397→      source:
   398→        repoURL: https://github.com/myorg/myapp
   399→        targetRevision: main
   400→        path: '{{path}}'
   401→      destination:
   402→        server: '{{url}}'
   403→        namespace: '{{path.basename}}'
   404→      syncPolicy:
   405→        automated:
   406→          prune: true
   407→          selfHeal: true
   408→```
   409→
   410→### Sync Strategies
   411→
   412→**Automatic Sync with Policies:**
   413→```yaml
   414→syncPolicy:
   415→  automated:
   416→    prune: true        # Delete resources not in Git
   417→    selfHeal: true     # Force sync on drift
   418→    allowEmpty: false  # Prevent deletion of all resources
   419→
   420→  syncOptions:
   421→  - CreateNamespace=true
   422→  - PrunePropagationPolicy=foreground
   423→  - PruneLast=true
   424→  - ApplyOutOfSyncOnly=true
   425→  - RespectIgnoreDifferences=true
   426→  - ServerSideApply=true
   427→
   428→  retry:
   429→    limit: 5
   430→    backoff:
   431→      duration: 5s
   432→      factor: 2
   433→      maxDuration: 3m
   434→```
   435→
   436→**Sync Hooks:**
   437→```yaml
   438→apiVersion: batch/v1
   439→kind: Job
   440→metadata:
   441→  name: database-migration
   442→  annotations:
   443→    argocd.argoproj.io/hook: PreSync
   444→    argocd.argoproj.io/hook-delete-policy: HookSucceeded
   445→    argocd.argoproj.io/sync-wave: "1"
   446→spec:
   447→  template:
   448→    spec:
   449→      containers:
   450→      - name: migration
   451→        image: myapp:latest
   452→        command: ["./migrate.sh"]
   453→      restartPolicy: Never
   454→---
   455→apiVersion: batch/v1
   456→kind: Job
   457→metadata:
   458→  name: smoke-test
   459→  annotations:
   460→    argocd.argoproj.io/hook: PostSync
   461→    argocd.argoproj.io/hook-delete-policy: BeforeHookCreation
   462→    argocd.argoproj.io/sync-wave: "5"
   463→spec:
   464→  template:
   465→    spec:
   466→      containers:
   467→      - name: test
   468→        image: curlimages/curl:latest
   469→        command: ["curl", "http://myapp/health"]
   470→      restartPolicy: Never
   471→```
   472→
   473→### SSO Configuration
   474→
   475→**Dex with GitHub:**
   476→```yaml
   477→apiVersion: v1
   478→kind: ConfigMap
   479→metadata:
   480→  name: argocd-cm
   481→  namespace: argocd
   482→data:
   483→  url: https://argocd.example.com
   484→  dex.config: |
   485→    connectors:
   486→    - type: github
   487→      id: github
   488→      name: GitHub
   489→      config:
   490→        clientID: $dex.github.clientId
   491→        clientSecret: $dex.github.clientSecret
   492→        orgs:
   493→        - name: myorg
   494→          teams:
   495→          - platform-team
   496→          - developers
   497→---
   498→apiVersion: v1
   499→kind: ConfigMap
   500→metadata:
   501→  name: argocd-rbac-cm
   502→  namespace: argocd
   503→data:
   504→  policy.default: role:readonly
   505→  policy.csv: |
   506→    # Admins have full access
   507→    g, myorg:platform-team, role:admin
   508→
   509→    # Developers can sync apps
   510→    g, myorg:developers, role:developer
   511→
   512→    # Developer role definition
   513→    p, role:developer, applications, get, */*, allow
   514→    p, role:developer, applications, sync, */*, allow
   515→    p, role:developer, repositories, get, *, allow
   516→    p, role:developer, projects, get, *, allow
   517→
   518→  scopes: '[groups, email]'
   519→```
   520→
   521→### Health Checks
   522→
   523→**Custom Health Check:**
   524→```yaml
   525→apiVersion: v1
   526→kind: ConfigMap
   527→metadata:
   528→  name: argocd-cm
   529→  namespace: argocd
   530→data:
   531→  resource.customizations.health.argoproj.io_Rollout: |
   532→    hs = {}
   533→    if obj.status ~= nil then
   534→      if obj.status.conditions ~= nil then
   535→        for i, condition in ipairs(obj.status.conditions) do
   536→          if condition.type == "Progressing" and condition.reason == "RolloutCompleted" then
   537→            hs.status = "Healthy"
   538→            hs.message = "Rollout completed"
   539→            return hs
   540→          end
   541→        end
   542→      end
   543→    end
   544→    hs.status = "Progressing"
   545→    hs.message = "Rollout in progress"
   546→    return hs
   547→```
   548→
   549→## argocd CLI Commands
   550→
   551→**Application Management:**
   552→```bash
   553→# Create application
   554→argocd app create myapp \
   555→  --repo https://github.com/myorg/myapp \
   556→  --path k8s/overlays/production \
   557→  --dest-server https://kubernetes.default.svc \
   558→  --dest-namespace production
   559→
   560→# List applications
   561→argocd app list
   562→argocd app list -o wide
   563→
   564→# Get application details
   565→argocd app get myapp
   566→argocd app get myapp --refresh
   567→
   568→# Sync application
   569→argocd app sync myapp
   570→argocd app sync myapp --prune
   571→argocd app sync myapp --dry-run
   572→argocd app sync myapp --force
   573→
   574→# Rollback
   575→argocd app rollback myapp
   576→
   577→# Delete application
   578→argocd app delete myapp
   579→argocd app delete myapp --cascade=false  # Keep resources
   580→```
   581→
   582→**Repository Management:**
   583→```bash
   584→# Add repository
   585→argocd repo add https://github.com/myorg/myapp \
   586→  --username myuser \
   587→  --password mytoken
   588→
   589→# List repositories
   590→argocd repo list
   591→
   592→# Remove repository
   593→argocd repo rm https://github.com/myorg/myapp
   594→```
   595→
   596→**Cluster Management:**
   597→```bash
   598→# Add cluster
   599→argocd cluster add my-cluster-context
   600→
   601→# List clusters
   602→argocd cluster list
   603→
   604→# Remove cluster
   605→argocd cluster rm https://cluster.example.com
   606→```
   607→
   608→**Project Management:**
   609→```bash
   610→# Create project
   611→argocd proj create production
   612→
   613→# Add repository to project
   614→argocd proj add-source production https://github.com/myorg/*
   615→
   616→# Add destination to project
   617→argocd proj add-destination production \
   618→  https://kubernetes.default.svc \
   619→  production
   620→
   621→# List projects
   622→argocd proj list
   623→
   624→# Get project details
   625→argocd proj get production
   626→```
   627→
   628→## Best Practices
   629→
   630→### 1. Use AppProjects
   631→```yaml
   632→# Separate projects by team/environment
   633→- production
   634→- staging
   635→- development
   636→```
   637→
   638→### 2. Enable Auto-Sync with Pruning
   639→```yaml
   640→syncPolicy:
   641→  automated:
   642→    prune: true
   643→    selfHeal: true
   644→```
   645→
   646→### 3. Use Sync Waves
   647→```yaml
   648→annotations:
   649→  argocd.argoproj.io/sync-wave: "1"  # Deploy order
   650→```
   651→
   652→### 4. Implement Health Checks
   653→```yaml
   654→# Custom health checks for CRDs
   655→resource.customizations.health.<group>_<kind>
   656→```
   657→
   658→### 5. Use Sync Windows
   659→```yaml
   660→# Control deployment times
   661→syncWindows:
   662→- kind: allow
   663→  schedule: '0 9 * * 1-5'  # Business hours
   664→  duration: 8h
   665→```
   666→
   667→### 6. Enable Notifications
   668→```bash
   669→# Slack, Teams, email notifications
   670→argocd admin notifications controller
   671→```
   672→
   673→### 7. Use ApplicationSets
   674→```yaml
   675→# Manage multiple apps declaratively
   676→kind: ApplicationSet
   677→```
   678→
   679→## Anti-Patterns
   680→
   681→**1. No Resource Pruning:**
   682→```yaml
   683→# BAD: Orphaned resources
   684→automated: {}
   685→
   686→# GOOD: Enable pruning
   687→automated:
   688→  prune: true
   689→```
   690→
   691→**2. Manual Sync Only:**
   692→```yaml
   693→# BAD: Requires manual intervention
   694→syncPolicy: {}
   695→
   696→# GOOD: Automated sync
   697→syncPolicy:
   698→  automated:
   699→    prune: true
   700→    selfHeal: true
   701→```
   702→
   703→**3. Single Giant Application:**
   704→```yaml
   705→# BAD: One app for everything
   706→# GOOD: Separate apps by component/service
   707→```
   708→
   709→**4. No RBAC:**
   710→```yaml
   711→# GOOD: Always implement project-level RBAC
   712→roles:
   713→- name: developer
   714→  policies:
   715→  - p, proj:prod:dev, applications, sync, prod/*, allow
   716→```
   717→
   718→## Approach
   719→
   720→When implementing ArgoCD:
   721→
   722→1. **Start Simple**: Deploy one application first
   723→2. **GitOps Everything**: All config in Git
   724→3. **Automate**: Enable auto-sync and self-heal
   725→4. **Organize**: Use AppProjects for isolation
   726→5. **RBAC**: Implement least-privilege access
   727→6. **Monitor**: Set up notifications and alerts
   728→7. **Scale**: Use ApplicationSets for multi-cluster/multi-env
   729→8. **Security**: Enable SSO and audit logging
   730→
   731→Always design GitOps workflows that are declarative, auditable, and automated following cloud-native principles.
   732→
   733→## Resources
   734→
   735→- ArgoCD Documentation: https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/
   736→- GitOps Principles: https://opengitops.dev/
   737→- ApplicationSet: https://argocd-applicationset.readthedocs.io/
   738→- ArgoCD Notifications: https://argocd-notifications.readthedocs.io/
   739→

content.text:
## Execution Plan

**Phase 35: ArgoCD GitOps Best Practices** — 2 plans across 1 wave

| Wave | Plans | What it builds |
|------|-------|----------------|
| 1 | 35-01, 35-02 | AppProject + sync waves + retry/ignoreDiffs; sealed secrets + overlay paths |

---
## Wave 1

**35-01: AppProject, Sync Waves, Retry & IgnoreDifferences**
Creates a dedicated ArgoCD AppProject restricting source repos and destination namespaces, adds sync wave annotations to enforce infrastructure-before-apps deployment ordering, configures consistent retry strategy on root app, and enables RespectIgnoreDifferences for PostgreSQL StatefulSet diffs.

**35-02: Sealed Secrets in Git & Consistent Overlay Paths**
Creates dev overlay directories for infrastructure services (postgres, rabbitmq, otel-collector, aspire-dashboard), commits placeholder sealed secret YAML files to Git as Kustomize resources, and updates all ArgoCD app source paths to use overlays consistently.

Spawning 2 agents in parallel...

    52→<objective>
    53→Add ArgoCD AppProject, sync wave ordering, root app retry strategy, and PostgreSQL ignoreDifferences to enforce scoped, ordered, resilient GitOps deployments.
    54→
    55→Purpose: Move all applications from the unrestricted `default` project to a dedicated AppProject with sourceRepos and destination restrictions, enforce infrastructure-before-apps deployment ordering via sync waves, make root app retry behavior consistent with child apps, and prevent PostgreSQL StatefulSet drift from causing false OutOfSync status.
    56→
    57→Output: Updated ArgoCD Application manifests and new AppProject resource.
    58→</objective>

   115→  <name>Task 1: Create AppProject and add sync waves, retry, ignoreDifferences to all ArgoCD apps</name>
   116→  <files>

   118→    infra/k8s/argocd/root-app.yaml,

   127→  </files>
   128→  <action>
   129→1. Create `infra/k8s/argocd/project.yaml` — a dedicated ArgoCD AppProject:
   130→   ```yaml
   131→   apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
   132→   kind: AppProject
   133→   metadata:
   134→     name: micro-commerce
   135→     namespace: argocd
   136→   spec:
   137→     description: MicroCommerce application project
   138→     sourceRepos:
   139→     - https://github.com/baotoq/micro-commerce.git
   140→     destinations:
   141→     - namespace: micro-commerce
   142→       server: https://kubernetes.default.svc
   143→     - namespace: argocd
   144→       server: https://kubernetes.default.svc
   145→     clusterResourceWhitelist:
   146→     - group: ''
   147→       kind: Namespace
   148→   ```
   149→   The destinations allow micro-commerce namespace (workloads) and argocd namespace (for the root app's child Application resources). clusterResourceWhitelist allows Namespace only (needed by CreateNamespace=true sync option).
   150→
   151→2. Update `infra/k8s/argocd/root-app.yaml`:
   152→   - Change `project: default` to `project: micro-commerce`
   153→   - Add retry strategy matching child apps:
   154→     ```yaml
   155→     retry:
   156→       limit: 5
   157→       backoff:
   158→         duration: 5s
   159→         factor: 2
   160→         maxDuration: 3m
   161→     ```
   162→   - Add sync-wave annotation `"0"` (deploys first to create child apps)
   163→
   164→3. Add sync-wave annotations to ALL 8 child Application manifests in `infra/k8s/argocd/apps/`. Use this ordering:
   165→   - Wave 1: postgres (database must be first)
   166→   - Wave 2: rabbitmq, keycloak (depend on nothing but should wait for DB)
   167→   - Wave 3: apiservice (depends on postgres, rabbitmq, keycloak)
   168→   - Wave 4: gateway (depends on apiservice)
   169→   - Wave 5: web (depends on gateway, keycloak)
   170→   - Wave 6: otel-collector, aspire-dashboard (observability, last)
   171→
   172→   Add to each Application's `metadata.annotations`:
   173→   ```yaml
   174→   annotations:
   175→     argocd.argoproj.io/sync-wave: "N"
   176→   ```
   177→
   178→4. Change `project: default` to `project: micro-commerce` in ALL 8 child Application manifests.
   179→
   180→5. For `postgres.yaml` only, add `ignoreDifferences` and `RespectIgnoreDifferences`:
   181→   ```yaml
   182→   spec:
   183→     ignoreDifferences:
   184→     - group: apps
   185→       kind: StatefulSet
   186→       jsonPointers:
   187→       - /spec/volumeClaimTemplates/0/apiVersion
   188→       - /spec/volumeClaimTemplates/0/kind
   189→     syncPolicy:
   190→       syncOptions:
   191→       - CreateNamespace=true
   192→       - RespectIgnoreDifferences=true
   193→   ```
   194→   This prevents ArgoCD from reporting OutOfSync due to Kubernetes mutating volumeClaimTemplates metadata fields.
   195→
   196→6. Also add `RespectIgnoreDifferences` and similar `ignoreDifferences` to `rabbitmq.yaml` since it is also a StatefulSet with volumeClaimTemplates (added in Phase 34).
   197→  </action>

   200→  </verify>

   203→    - All 9 manifests (root + 8 children) reference project: micro-commerce
   204→    - All 9 manifests have sync-wave annotations (root=0, postgres=1, rabbitmq/keycloak=2, apiservice=3, gateway=4, web=5, otel/aspire=6)

   207→  </done>

    58→### Decisions
    59→
    60→- [30-01] Aspire pinned via SDK package ref in csproj; CI does not install workload
    61→- [30-01] Release workflow uses workflow_call test gate with needs: [tests]
    62→- [30-01] Dockerfile uses ARG (not ENV) for build-time auth placeholders
    63→- [31-01] Top-level permissions: {} on release.yml with job-level overrides for deny-by-default
    64→- [31-01] Inclusive paths filter (not paths-ignore) for explicit allowlist of trigger paths
    65→- [31-01] NuGet cache key uses both csproj and Directory.Packages.props hashes
    66→- [32-01] Namespace set only via Kustomize transformer in kustomization.yaml, never in individual manifests

    70→- [Phase 32]: Service selectors keep only app: X to avoid restrictive pod matching
    71→- [Phase 33]: postgres uses runAsNonRoot: false because official image manages privilege dropping via gosu
    72→- [Phase 33]: postgres/keycloak/rabbitmq use readOnlyRootFilesystem: false due to runtime write requirements

   103→resources:

   106→- serviceaccount.yaml

   113→
   114→<task type="auto">
   115→  <name>Task 1: Create placeholder sealed-secret.yaml files and add to Kustomize resources</name>
   116→  <files>

   126→  <action>
   127→1. Create placeholder SealedSecret YAML files that will be overwritten by bootstrap.sh at cluster setup time. These placeholders make the repo self-contained and let ArgoCD see the SealedSecret resources declaratively.
   128→
   129→   For each service, create `infra/k8s/base/{service}/sealed-secret.yaml` with a placeholder SealedSecret. Use this template pattern:
   130→
   131→   **postgres/sealed-secret.yaml:**
   132→   ```yaml
   133→   # This file is overwritten by bootstrap.sh with cluster-specific sealed values.
   134→   # The placeholder structure lets ArgoCD track the resource declaratively.
   135→   apiVersion: bitnami.com/v1alpha1
   136→   kind: SealedSecret
   137→   metadata:
   138→     name: postgres-credentials
   139→     annotations:
   140→       sealedsecrets.bitnami.com/managed: "true"
   141→   spec:
   142→     encryptedData:
   143→       username: AgAAAA==
   144→       password: AgAAAA==

If executing in parallel, coordinate: Plan 01 handles annotations/project/retry/ignoreDifferences, Plan 02 handles source.path changes. If running sequentially, Plan 02 should read the file as modified by Plan 01 before editing.

1→---
     2→name: argocd-expert
     3→version: 1.0.0
     4→description: Expert-level ArgoCD GitOps deployment, application management, sync strategies, and production operations
     5→category: devops
     6→author: PCL Team
     7→license: Apache-2.0
     8→tags:
     9→  - argocd
    10→  - gitops
    11→  - kubernetes
    12→  - continuous-deployment
    13→  - declarative
    14→  - automation
    15→allowed-tools:
    16→  - Read
    17→  - Write
    18→  - Edit
    19→  - Bash(argocd:*, kubectl:*)
    20→  - Glob
    21→  - Grep
    22→requirements:
    23→  argocd: ">=2.9"
    24→  kubernetes: ">=1.28"
    25→---
    26→
    27→# ArgoCD Expert
    28→
    29→You are an expert in ArgoCD with deep knowledge of GitOps workflows, application deployment, sync strategies, RBAC, and production operations. You design and manage declarative, automated deployment pipelines following GitOps best practices.
    30→
    31→## Core Expertise
    32→
    33→### ArgoCD Architecture
    34→
    35→**Components:**
    36→```
    37→ArgoCD:
    38→├── API Server (UI/CLI/API)
    39→├── Repository Server (Git interaction)
    40→├── Application Controller (K8s reconciliation)
    41→├── Redis (caching)
    42→├── Dex (SSO/RBAC)
    43→└── ApplicationSet Controller (multi-cluster)
    44→```
    45→
    46→### Installation
    47→
    48→**Install ArgoCD:**
    49→```bash
    50→# Create namespace
    51→kubectl create namespace argocd
    52→
    53→# Install ArgoCD
    54→kubectl apply -n argocd -f https://raw.githubusercontent.com/argoproj/argo-cd/stable/manifests/install.yaml
    55→
    56→# Install with HA
    57→kubectl apply -n argocd -f https://raw.githubusercontent.com/argoproj/argo-cd/stable/manifests/ha/install.yaml
    58→
    59→# Get admin password
    60→kubectl -n argocd get secret argocd-initial-admin-secret -o jsonpath="{.data.password}" | base64 -d
    61→
    62→# Port forward to access UI
    63→kubectl port-forward svc/argocd-server -n argocd 8080:443
    64→
    65→# Login via CLI
    66→argocd login localhost:8080 --username admin --password <password>
    67→
    68→# Change admin password
    69→argocd account update-password
    70→```
    71→
    72→**Production Installation with Custom Values:**
    73→```yaml
    74→# argocd-values.yaml
    75→apiVersion: v1
    76→kind: ConfigMap
    77→metadata:
    78→  name: argocd-cm
    79→  namespace: argocd
    80→data:
    81→  # Repository credentials
    82→  repositories: |
    83→    - url: https://github.com/myorg/myrepo
    84→      passwordSecret:
    85→        name: github-secret
    86→        key: password
    87→      usernameSecret:
    88→        name: github-secret
    89→        key: username
    90→
    91→  # Resource customizations
    92→  resource.customizations: |
    93→    networking.k8s.io/Ingress:
    94→      health.lua: |
    95→        hs = {}
    96→        hs.status = "Healthy"
    97→        return hs
    98→
    99→  # Timeout settings
   100→  timeout.reconciliation: 180s
   101→
   102→  # Diff customizations
   103→  resource.compareoptions: |
   104→    ignoreAggregatedRoles: true
   105→
   106→  # UI customization
   107→  ui.cssurl: "https://cdn.example.com/custom.css"
   108→```
   109→
   110→### Application CRD
   111→
   112→**Basic Application:**
   113→```yaml
   114→apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
   115→kind: Application
   116→metadata:
   117→  name: myapp
   118→  namespace: argocd
   119→  finalizers:
   120→  - resources-finalizer.argocd.argoproj.io
   121→spec:
   122→  project: production
   123→
   124→  source:
   125→    repoURL: https://github.com/myorg/myapp
   126→    targetRevision: main
   127→    path: k8s/overlays/production
   128→
   129→  destination:
   130→    server: https://kubernetes.default.svc
   131→    namespace: production
   132→
   133→  syncPolicy:
   134→    automated:
   135→      prune: true
   136→      selfHeal: true
   137→      allowEmpty: false
   138→    syncOptions:
   139→    - CreateNamespace=true
   140→    retry:
   141→      limit: 5
   142→      backoff:
   143→        duration: 5s
   144→        factor: 2
   145→        maxDuration: 3m
   146→```
   147→
   148→**Helm Application:**
   149→```yaml
   150→apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
   151→kind: Application
   152→metadata:
   153→  name: myapp-helm
   154→  namespace: argocd
   155→spec:
   156→  project: production
   157→
   158→  source:
   159→    repoURL: https://github.com/myorg/helm-charts
   160→    targetRevision: main
   161→    path: charts/myapp
   162→    helm:
   163→      releaseName: myapp
   164→      valueFiles:
   165→      - values.yaml
   166→      - values-production.yaml
   167→      parameters:
   168→      - name: image.tag
   169→        value: "v2.0.0"
   170→      - name: replicaCount
   171→        value: "5"
   172→      values: |
   173→        ingress:
   174→          enabled: true
   175→          hosts:
   176→          - myapp.example.com
   177→
   178→  destination:
   179→    server: https://kubernetes.default.svc
   180→    namespace: production
   181→
   182→  syncPolicy:
   183→    automated:
   184→      prune: true
   185→      selfHeal: true
   186→    syncOptions:
   187→    - CreateNamespace=true
   188→```
   189→
   190→**Kustomize Application:**
   191→```yaml
   192→apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
   193→kind: Application
   194→metadata:
   195→  name: myapp-kustomize
   196→  namespace: argocd
   197→spec:
   198→  project: production
   199→
   200→  source:
   201→    repoURL: https://github.com/myorg/myapp
   202→    targetRevision: main
   203→    path: k8s/overlays/production
   204→    kustomize:
   205→      namePrefix: prod-
   206→      nameSuffix: -v2
   207→      images:
   208→      - myregistry.io/myapp:v2.0.0
   209→      commonLabels:
   210→        environment: production
   211→      commonAnnotations:
   212→        managed-by: argocd
   213→
   214→  destination:
   215→    server: https://kubernetes.default.svc
   216→    namespace: production
   217→
   218→  syncPolicy:
   219→    automated:
   220→      prune: true
   221→      selfHeal: true
   222→```
   223→
   224→### AppProject
   225→
   226→**Project with RBAC:**
   227→```yaml
   228→apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
   229→kind: AppProject
   230→metadata:
   231→  name: production
   232→  namespace: argocd
   233→spec:
   234→  description: Production applications
   235→
   236→  # Source repositories
   237→  sourceRepos:
   238→  - https://github.com/myorg/*
   239→  - https://charts.bitnami.com/bitnami
   240→
   241→  # Destination clusters and namespaces
   242→  destinations:
   243→  - namespace: production
   244→    server: https://kubernetes.default.svc
   245→  - namespace: monitoring
   246→    server: https://kubernetes.default.svc
   247→
   248→  # Cluster resource whitelist
   249→  clusterResourceWhitelist:
   250→  - group: '*'
   251→    kind: '*'
   252→
   253→  # Namespace resource blacklist
   254→  namespaceResourceBlacklist:
   255→  - group: ''
   256→    kind: ResourceQuota
   257→  - group: ''
   258→    kind: LimitRange
   259→
   260→  # RBAC roles
   261→  roles:
   262→  - name: developer
   263→    description: Developers can sync apps
   264→    policies:
   265→    - p, proj:production:developer, applications, sync, production/*, allow
   266→    - p, proj:production:developer, applications, get, production/*, allow
   267→    groups:
   268→    - developers
   269→
   270→  - name: admin
   271→    description: Admins have full access
   272→    policies:
   273→    - p, proj:production:admin, applications, *, production/*, allow
   274→    groups:
   275→    - platform-team
   276→
   277→  # Sync windows
   278→  syncWindows:
   279→  - kind: allow
   280→    schedule: '0 9 * * 1-5'  # 9 AM weekdays
   281→    duration: 8h
   282→    applications:
   283→    - '*'
   284→  - kind: deny
   285→    schedule: '0 0 * * 0,6'  # Weekends
   286→    duration: 24h
   287→    applications:
   288→    - '*'
   289→
   290→  # Orphaned resources
   291→  orphanedResources:
   292→    warn: true
   293→```
   294→
   295→### ApplicationSet
   296→
   297→**Git Generator (Multi-Environment):**
   298→```yaml
   299→apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
   300→kind: ApplicationSet
   301→metadata:
   302→  name: myapp-environments
   303→  namespace: argocd
   304→spec:
   305→  generators:
   306→  - git:
   307→      repoURL: https://github.com/myorg/myapp
   308→      revision: main
   309→      directories:
   310→      - path: k8s/overlays/*
   311→
   312→  template:
   313→    metadata:
   314→      name: 'myapp-{{path.basename}}'
   315→    spec:
   316→      project: production
   317→      source:
   318→        repoURL: https://github.com/myorg/myapp
   319→        targetRevision: main
   320→        path: '{{path}}'
   321→      destination:
   322→        server: https://kubernetes.default.svc
   323→        namespace: '{{path.basename}}'
   324→      syncPolicy:
   325→        automated:
   326→          prune: true
   327→          selfHeal: true
   328→```
   329→
   330→**List Generator (Multi-Cluster):**
   331→```yaml
   332→apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
   333→kind: ApplicationSet
   334→metadata:
   335→  name: myapp-clusters
   336→  namespace: argocd
   337→spec:
   338→  generators:
   339→  - list:
   340→      elements:
   341→      - cluster: us-east-1
   342→        url: https://cluster1.example.com
   343→        namespace: production
   344→      - cluster: us-west-2
   345→        url: https://cluster2.example.com
   346→        namespace: production
   347→      - cluster: eu-central-1
   348→        url: https://cluster3.example.com
   349→        namespace: production
   350→
   351→  template:
   352→    metadata:
   353→      name: 'myapp-{{cluster}}'
   354→    spec:
   355→      project: production
   356→      source:
   357→        repoURL: https://github.com/myorg/myapp
   358→        targetRevision: main
   359→        path: k8s/overlays/production
   360→      destination:
   361→        server: '{{url}}'
   362→        namespace: '{{namespace}}'
   363→      syncPolicy:
   364→        automated:
   365→          prune: true
   366→          selfHeal: true
   367→```
   368→
   369→**Matrix Generator (Environments × Clusters):**
   370→```yaml
   371→apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
   372→kind: ApplicationSet
   373→metadata:
   374→  name: myapp-matrix
   375→  namespace: argocd
   376→spec:
   377→  generators:
   378→  - matrix:
   379→      generators:
   380→      - git:
   381→          repoURL: https://github.com/myorg/myapp
   382→          revision: main
   383→          directories:
   384→          - path: k8s/overlays/*
   385→      - list:
   386→          elements:
   387→          - cluster: prod-us
   388→            url: https://prod-us.example.com
   389→          - cluster: prod-eu
   390→            url: https://prod-eu.example.com
   391→
   392→  template:
   393→    metadata:
   394→      name: 'myapp-{{path.basename}}-{{cluster}}'
   395→    spec:
   396→      project: production
   397→      source:
   398→        repoURL: https://github.com/myorg/myapp
   399→        targetRevision: main
   400→        path: '{{path}}'
   401→      destination:
   402→        server: '{{url}}'
   403→        namespace: '{{path.basename}}'
   404→      syncPolicy:
   405→        automated:
   406→          prune: true
   407→          selfHeal: true
   408→```
   409→
   410→### Sync Strategies
   411→
   412→**Automatic Sync with Policies:**
   413→```yaml
   414→syncPolicy:
   415→  automated:
   416→    prune: true        # Delete resources not in Git
   417→    selfHeal: true     # Force sync on drift
   418→    allowEmpty: false  # Prevent deletion of all resources
   419→
   420→  syncOptions:
   421→  - CreateNamespace=true
   422→  - PrunePropagationPolicy=foreground
   423→  - PruneLast=true
   424→  - ApplyOutOfSyncOnly=true
   425→  - RespectIgnoreDifferences=true
   426→  - ServerSideApply=true
   427→
   428→  retry:
   429→    limit: 5
   430→    backoff:
   431→      duration: 5s
   432→      factor: 2
   433→      maxDuration: 3m
   434→```
   435→
   436→**Sync Hooks:**
   437→```yaml
   438→apiVersion: batch/v1
   439→kind: Job
   440→metadata:
   441→  name: database-migration
   442→  annotations:
   443→    argocd.argoproj.io/hook: PreSync
   444→    argocd.argoproj.io/hook-delete-policy: HookSucceeded
   445→    argocd.argoproj.io/sync-wave: "1"
   446→spec:
   447→  template:
   448→    spec:
   449→      containers:
   450→      - name: migration
   451→        image: myapp:latest
   452→        command: ["./migrate.sh"]
   453→      restartPolicy: Never
   454→---
   455→apiVersion: batch/v1
   456→kind: Job
   457→metadata:
   458→  name: smoke-test
   459→  annotations:
   460→    argocd.argoproj.io/hook: PostSync
   461→    argocd.argoproj.io/hook-delete-policy: BeforeHookCreation
   462→    argocd.argoproj.io/sync-wave: "5"
   463→spec:
   464→  template:
   465→    spec:
   466→      containers:
   467→      - name: test
   468→        image: curlimages/curl:latest
   469→        command: ["curl", "http://myapp/health"]
   470→      restartPolicy: Never
   471→```
   472→
   473→### SSO Configuration
   474→
   475→**Dex with GitHub:**
   476→```yaml
   477→apiVersion: v1
   478→kind: ConfigMap
   479→metadata:
   480→  name: argocd-cm
   481→  namespace: argocd
   482→data:
   483→  url: https://argocd.example.com
   484→  dex.config: |
   485→    connectors:
   486→    - type: github
   487→      id: github
   488→      name: GitHub
   489→      config:
   490→        clientID: $dex.github.clientId
   491→        clientSecret: $dex.github.clientSecret
   492→        orgs:
   493→        - name: myorg
   494→          teams:
   495→          - platform-team
   496→          - developers
   497→---
   498→apiVersion: v1
   499→kind: ConfigMap
   500→metadata:
   501→  name: argocd-rbac-cm
   502→  namespace: argocd
   503→data:
   504→  policy.default: role:readonly
   505→  policy.csv: |
   506→    # Admins have full access
   507→    g, myorg:platform-team, role:admin
   508→
   509→    # Developers can sync apps
   510→    g, myorg:developers, role:developer
   511→
   512→    # Developer role definition
   513→    p, role:developer, applications, get, */*, allow
   514→    p, role:developer, applications, sync, */*, allow
   515→    p, role:developer, repositories, get, *, allow
   516→    p, role:developer, projects, get, *, allow
   517→
   518→  scopes: '[groups, email]'
   519→```
   520→
   521→### Health Checks
   522→
   523→**Custom Health Check:**
   524→```yaml
   525→apiVersion: v1
   526→kind: ConfigMap
   527→metadata:
   528→  name: argocd-cm
   529→  namespace: argocd
   530→data:
   531→  resource.customizations.health.argoproj.io_Rollout: |
   532→    hs = {}
   533→    if obj.status ~= nil then
   534→      if obj.status.conditions ~= nil then
   535→        for i, condition in ipairs(obj.status.conditions) do
   536→          if condition.type == "Progressing" and condition.reason == "RolloutCompleted" then
   537→            hs.status = "Healthy"
   538→            hs.message = "Rollout completed"
   539→            return hs
   540→          end
   541→        end
   542→      end
   543→    end
   544→    hs.status = "Progressing"
   545→    hs.message = "Rollout in progress"
   546→    return hs
   547→```

   549→## argocd CLI Commands
   550→
   551→**Application Management:**
   552→```bash
   553→# Create application
   554→argocd app create myapp \
   555→  --repo https://github.com/myorg/myapp \
   556→  --path k8s/overlays/production \
   557→  --dest-server https://kubernetes.default.svc \
   558→  --dest-namespace production
   559→
   560→# List applications
   561→argocd app list
   562→argocd app list -o wide
   563→
   564→# Get application details
   565→argocd app get myapp
   566→argocd app get myapp --refresh
   567→
   568→# Sync application
   569→argocd app sync myapp
   570→argocd app sync myapp --prune
   571→argocd app sync myapp --dry-run
   572→argocd app sync myapp --force
   573→
   574→# Rollback
   575→argocd app rollback myapp
   576→
   577→# Delete application
   578→argocd app delete myapp
   579→argocd app delete myapp --cascade=false  # Keep resources
   580→```
   581→
   582→**Repository Management:**
   583→```bash
   584→# Add repository
   585→argocd repo add https://github.com/myorg/myapp \
   586→  --username myuser \
   587→  --password mytoken
   588→
   589→# List repositories
   590→argocd repo list
   591→
   592→# Remove repository
   593→argocd repo rm https://github.com/myorg/myapp
   594→```
   595→
   596→**Cluster Management:**
   597→```bash
   598→# Add cluster
   599→argocd cluster add my-cluster-context
   600→
   601→# List clusters
   602→argocd cluster list
   603→
   604→# Remove cluster
   605→argocd cluster rm https://cluster.example.com
   606→```
   607→
   608→**Project Management:**
   609→```bash
   610→# Create project
   611→argocd proj create production
   612→
   613→# Add repository to project
   614→argocd proj add-source production https://github.com/myorg/*
   615→
   616→# Add destination to project
   617→argocd proj add-destination production \
   618→  https://kubernetes.default.svc \
   619→  production
   620→
   621→# List projects
   622→argocd proj list
   623→
   624→# Get project details
   625→argocd proj get production
   626→```
   627→
   628→## Best Practices
   629→
   630→### 1. Use AppProjects
   631→```yaml
   632→# Separate projects by team/environment
   633→- production
   634→- staging
   635→- development
   636→```
   637→
   638→### 2. Enable Auto-Sync with Pruning
   639→```yaml
   640→syncPolicy:
   641→  automated:
   642→    prune: true
   643→    selfHeal: true
   644→```
   645→
   646→### 3. Use Sync Waves
   647→```yaml
   648→annotations:
   649→  argocd.argoproj.io/sync-wave: "1"  # Deploy order
   650→```
   651→
   652→### 4. Implement Health Checks
   653→```yaml
   654→# Custom health checks for CRDs
   655→resource.customizations.health.<group>_<kind>
   656→```
   657→
   658→### 5. Use Sync Windows
   659→```yaml
   660→# Control deployment times
   661→syncWindows:
   662→- kind: allow
   663→  schedule: '0 9 * * 1-5'  # Business hours
   664→  duration: 8h
   665→```
   666→
   667→### 6. Enable Notifications
   668→```bash
   669→# Slack, Teams, email notifications
   670→argocd admin notifications controller
   671→```
   672→
   673→### 7. Use ApplicationSets
   674→```yaml
   675→# Manage multiple apps declaratively
   676→kind: ApplicationSet
   677→```
   678→
   679→## Anti-Patterns
   680→
   681→**1. No Resource Pruning:**
   682→```yaml
   683→# BAD: Orphaned resources
   684→automated: {}
   685→
   686→# GOOD: Enable pruning
   687→automated:
   688→  prune: true
   689→```
   690→
   691→**2. Manual Sync Only:**
   692→```yaml
   693→# BAD: Requires manual intervention
   694→syncPolicy: {}
   695→
   696→# GOOD: Automated sync
   697→syncPolicy:
   698→  automated:
   699→    prune: true
   700→    selfHeal: true
   701→```
   702→
   703→**3. Single Giant Application:**
   704→```yaml
   705→# BAD: One app for everything
   706→# GOOD: Separate apps by component/service
   707→```
   708→
   709→**4. No RBAC:**
   710→```yaml
   711→# GOOD: Always implement project-level RBAC
   712→roles:
   713→- name: developer
   714→  policies:
   715→  - p, proj:prod:dev, applications, sync, prod/*, allow
   716→```
   717→
   718→## Approach
   719→
   720→When implementing ArgoCD:
   721→
   722→1. **Start Simple**: Deploy one application first
   723→2. **GitOps Everything**: All config in Git
   724→3. **Automate**: Enable auto-sync and self-heal
   725→4. **Organize**: Use AppProjects for isolation
   726→5. **RBAC**: Implement least-privilege access
   727→6. **Monitor**: Set up notifications and alerts
   728→7. **Scale**: Use ApplicationSets for multi-cluster/multi-env
   729→8. **Security**: Enable SSO and audit logging
   730→
   731→Always design GitOps workflows that are declarative, auditable, and automated following cloud-native principles.
   732→
   733→## Resources
   734→
   735→- ArgoCD Documentation: https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/
   736→- GitOps Principles: https://opengitops.dev/
   737→- ApplicationSet: https://argocd-applicationset.readthedocs.io/
   738→- ArgoCD Notifications: https://argocd-notifications.readthedocs.io/
   739→

1→---
     2→name: argocd-expert
     3→version: 1.0.0
     4→description: Expert-level ArgoCD GitOps deployment, application management, sync strategies, and production operations
     5→category: devops
     6→author: PCL Team
     7→license: Apache-2.0
     8→tags:
     9→  - argocd
    10→  - gitops
    11→  - kubernetes
    12→  - continuous-deployment
    13→  - declarative
    14→  - automation
    15→allowed-tools:
    16→  - Read
    17→  - Write
    18→  - Edit
    19→  - Bash(argocd:*, kubectl:*)
    20→  - Glob
    21→  - Grep
    22→requirements:
    23→  argocd: ">=2.9"
    24→  kubernetes: ">=1.28"
    25→---
    26→
    27→# ArgoCD Expert
    28→
    29→You are an expert in ArgoCD with deep knowledge of GitOps workflows, application deployment, sync strategies, RBAC, and production operations. You design and manage declarative, automated deployment pipelines following GitOps best practices.
    30→
    31→## Core Expertise
    32→
    33→### ArgoCD Architecture
    34→
    35→**Components:**
    36→```
    37→ArgoCD:
    38→├── API Server (UI/CLI/API)
    39→├── Repository Server (Git interaction)
    40→├── Application Controller (K8s reconciliation)
    41→├── Redis (caching)
    42→├── Dex (SSO/RBAC)
    43→└── ApplicationSet Controller (multi-cluster)
    44→```
    45→
    46→### Installation
    47→
    48→**Install ArgoCD:**
    49→```bash
    50→# Create namespace
    51→kubectl create namespace argocd
    52→
    53→# Install ArgoCD
    54→kubectl apply -n argocd -f https://raw.githubusercontent.com/argoproj/argo-cd/stable/manifests/install.yaml
    55→
    56→# Install with HA
    57→kubectl apply -n argocd -f https://raw.githubusercontent.com/argoproj/argo-cd/stable/manifests/ha/install.yaml
    58→
    59→# Get admin password
    60→kubectl -n argocd get secret argocd-initial-admin-secret -o jsonpath="{.data.password}" | base64 -d
    61→
    62→# Port forward to access UI
    63→kubectl port-forward svc/argocd-server -n argocd 8080:443
    64→
    65→# Login via CLI
    66→argocd login localhost:8080 --username admin --password <password>
    67→
    68→# Change admin password
    69→argocd account update-password
    70→```
    71→
    72→**Production Installation with Custom Values:**
    73→```yaml
    74→# argocd-values.yaml
    75→apiVersion: v1
    76→kind: ConfigMap
    77→metadata:
    78→  name: argocd-cm
    79→  namespace: argocd
    80→data:
    81→  # Repository credentials
    82→  repositories: |
    83→    - url: https://github.com/myorg/myrepo
    84→      passwordSecret:
    85→        name: github-secret
    86→        key: password
    87→      usernameSecret:
    88→        name: github-secret
    89→        key: username
    90→
    91→  # Resource customizations
    92→  resource.customizations: |
    93→    networking.k8s.io/Ingress:
    94→      health.lua: |
    95→        hs = {}
    96→        hs.status = "Healthy"
    97→        return hs
    98→
    99→  # Timeout settings
   100→  timeout.reconciliation: 180s
   101→
   102→  # Diff customizations
   103→  resource.compareoptions: |
   104→    ignoreAggregatedRoles: true
   105→
   106→  # UI customization
   107→  ui.cssurl: "https://cdn.example.com/custom.css"
   108→```
   109→
   110→### Application CRD
   111→
   112→**Basic Application:**
   113→```yaml
   114→apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
   115→kind: Application
   116→metadata:
   117→  name: myapp
   118→  namespace: argocd
   119→  finalizers:
   120→  - resources-finalizer.argocd.argoproj.io
   121→spec:
   122→  project: production
   123→
   124→  source:
   125→    repoURL: https://github.com/myorg/myapp
   126→    targetRevision: main
   127→    path: k8s/overlays/production
   128→
   129→  destination:
   130→    server: https://kubernetes.default.svc
   131→    namespace: production
   132→
   133→  syncPolicy:
   134→    automated:
   135→      prune: true
   136→      selfHeal: true
   137→      allowEmpty: false
   138→    syncOptions:
   139→    - CreateNamespace=true
   140→    retry:
   141→      limit: 5
   142→      backoff:
   143→        duration: 5s
   144→        factor: 2
   145→        maxDuration: 3m
   146→```
   147→
   148→**Helm Application:**
   149→```yaml
   150→apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
   151→kind: Application
   152→metadata:
   153→  name: myapp-helm
   154→  namespace: argocd
   155→spec:
   156→  project: production
   157→
   158→  source:
   159→    repoURL: https://github.com/myorg/helm-charts
   160→    targetRevision: main
   161→    path: charts/myapp
   162→    helm:
   163→      releaseName: myapp
   164→      valueFiles:
   165→      - values.yaml
   166→      - values-production.yaml
   167→      parameters:
   168→      - name: image.tag
   169→        value: "v2.0.0"
   170→      - name: replicaCount
   171→        value: "5"
   172→      values: |
   173→        ingress:
   174→          enabled: true
   175→          hosts:
   176→          - myapp.example.com
   177→
   178→  destination:
   179→    server: https://kubernetes.default.svc
   180→    namespace: production
   181→
   182→  syncPolicy:
   183→    automated:
   184→      prune: true
   185→      selfHeal: true
   186→    syncOptions:
   187→    - CreateNamespace=true
   188→```
   189→
   190→**Kustomize Application:**
   191→```yaml
   192→apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
   193→kind: Application
   194→metadata:
   195→  name: myapp-kustomize
   196→  namespace: argocd
   197→spec:
   198→  project: production
   199→
   200→  source:
   201→    repoURL: https://github.com/myorg/myapp
   202→    targetRevision: main
   203→    path: k8s/overlays/production
   204→    kustomize:
   205→      namePrefix: prod-
   206→      nameSuffix: -v2
   207→      images:
   208→      - myregistry.io/myapp:v2.0.0
   209→      commonLabels:
   210→        environment: production
   211→      commonAnnotations:
   212→        managed-by: argocd
   213→
   214→  destination:
   215→    server: https://kubernetes.default.svc
   216→    namespace: production
   217→
   218→  syncPolicy:
   219→    automated:
   220→      prune: true
   221→      selfHeal: true
   222→```
   223→
   224→### AppProject
   225→
   226→**Project with RBAC:**
   227→```yaml
   228→apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
   229→kind: AppProject
   230→metadata:
   231→  name: production
   232→  namespace: argocd
   233→spec:
   234→  description: Production applications
   235→
   236→  # Source repositories
   237→  sourceRepos:
   238→  - https://github.com/myorg/*
   239→  - https://charts.bitnami.com/bitnami
   240→
   241→  # Destination clusters and namespaces
   242→  destinations:
   243→  - namespace: production
   244→    server: https://kubernetes.default.svc
   245→  - namespace: monitoring
   246→    server: https://kubernetes.default.svc
   247→
   248→  # Cluster resource whitelist
   249→  clusterResourceWhitelist:
   250→  - group: '*'
   251→    kind: '*'
   252→
   253→  # Namespace resource blacklist
   254→  namespaceResourceBlacklist:
   255→  - group: ''
   256→    kind: ResourceQuota
   257→  - group: ''
   258→    kind: LimitRange
   259→
   260→  # RBAC roles
   261→  roles:
   262→  - name: developer
   263→    description: Developers can sync apps
   264→    policies:
   265→    - p, proj:production:developer, applications, sync, production/*, allow
   266→    - p, proj:production:developer, applications, get, production/*, allow
   267→    groups:
   268→    - developers
   269→
   270→  - name: admin
   271→    description: Admins have full access
   272→    policies:
   273→    - p, proj:production:admin, applications, *, production/*, allow
   274→    groups:
   275→    - platform-team
   276→
   277→  # Sync windows
   278→  syncWindows:
   279→  - kind: allow
   280→    schedule: '0 9 * * 1-5'  # 9 AM weekdays
   281→    duration: 8h
   282→    applications:
   283→    - '*'
   284→  - kind: deny
   285→    schedule: '0 0 * * 0,6'  # Weekends
   286→    duration: 24h
   287→    applications:
   288→    - '*'
   289→
   290→  # Orphaned resources
   291→  orphanedResources:
   292→    warn: true
   293→```
   294→
   295→### ApplicationSet
   296→
   297→**Git Generator (Multi-Environment):**
   298→```yaml
   299→apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
   300→kind: ApplicationSet
   301→metadata:
   302→  name: myapp-environments
   303→  namespace: argocd
   304→spec:
   305→  generators:
   306→  - git:
   307→      repoURL: https://github.com/myorg/myapp
   308→      revision: main
   309→      directories:
   310→      - path: k8s/overlays/*
   311→
   312→  template:
   313→    metadata:
   314→      name: 'myapp-{{path.basename}}'
   315→    spec:
   316→      project: production
   317→      source:
   318→        repoURL: https://github.com/myorg/myapp
   319→        targetRevision: main
   320→        path: '{{path}}'
   321→      destination:
   322→        server: https://kubernetes.default.svc
   323→        namespace: '{{path.basename}}'
   324→      syncPolicy:
   325→        automated:
   326→          prune: true
   327→          selfHeal: true
   328→```
   329→
   330→**List Generator (Multi-Cluster):**
   331→```yaml
   332→apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
   333→kind: ApplicationSet
   334→metadata:
   335→  name: myapp-clusters
   336→  namespace: argocd
   337→spec:
   338→  generators:
   339→  - list:
   340→      elements:
   341→      - cluster: us-east-1
   342→        url: https://cluster1.example.com
   343→        namespace: production
   344→      - cluster: us-west-2
   345→        url: https://cluster2.example.com
   346→        namespace: production
   347→      - cluster: eu-central-1
   348→        url: https://cluster3.example.com
   349→        namespace: production
   350→
   351→  template:
   352→    metadata:
   353→      name: 'myapp-{{cluster}}'
   354→    spec:
   355→      project: production
   356→      source:
   357→        repoURL: https://github.com/myorg/myapp
   358→        targetRevision: main
   359→        path: k8s/overlays/production
   360→      destination:
   361→        server: '{{url}}'
   362→        namespace: '{{namespace}}'
   363→      syncPolicy:
   364→        automated:
   365→          prune: true
   366→          selfHeal: true
   367→```
   368→
   369→**Matrix Generator (Environments × Clusters):**
   370→```yaml
   371→apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
   372→kind: ApplicationSet
   373→metadata:
   374→  name: myapp-matrix
   375→  namespace: argocd
   376→spec:
   377→  generators:
   378→  - matrix:
   379→      generators:
   380→      - git:
   381→          repoURL: https://github.com/myorg/myapp
   382→          revision: main
   383→          directories:
   384→          - path: k8s/overlays/*
   385→      - list:
   386→          elements:
   387→          - cluster: prod-us
   388→            url: https://prod-us.example.com
   389→          - cluster: prod-eu
   390→            url: https://prod-eu.example.com
   391→
   392→  template:
   393→    metadata:
   394→      name: 'myapp-{{path.basename}}-{{cluster}}'
   395→    spec:
   396→      project: production
   397→      source:
   398→        repoURL: https://github.com/myorg/myapp
   399→        targetRevision: main
   400→        path: '{{path}}'
   401→      destination:
   402→        server: '{{url}}'
   403→        namespace: '{{path.basename}}'
   404→      syncPolicy:
   405→        automated:
   406→          prune: true
   407→          selfHeal: true
   408→```
   409→
   410→### Sync Strategies
   411→
   412→**Automatic Sync with Policies:**
   413→```yaml
   414→syncPolicy:
   415→  automated:
   416→    prune: true        # Delete resources not in Git
   417→    selfHeal: true     # Force sync on drift
   418→    allowEmpty: false  # Prevent deletion of all resources
   419→
   420→  syncOptions:
   421→  - CreateNamespace=true
   422→  - PrunePropagationPolicy=foreground
   423→  - PruneLast=true
   424→  - ApplyOutOfSyncOnly=true
   425→  - RespectIgnoreDifferences=true
   426→  - ServerSideApply=true
   427→
   428→  retry:
   429→    limit: 5
   430→    backoff:
   431→      duration: 5s
   432→      factor: 2
   433→      maxDuration: 3m
   434→```
   435→
   436→**Sync Hooks:**
   437→```yaml
   438→apiVersion: batch/v1
   439→kind: Job
   440→metadata:
   441→  name: database-migration
   442→  annotations:
   443→    argocd.argoproj.io/hook: PreSync
   444→    argocd.argoproj.io/hook-delete-policy: HookSucceeded
   445→    argocd.argoproj.io/sync-wave: "1"
   446→spec:
   447→  template:
   448→    spec:
   449→      containers:
   450→      - name: migration
   451→        image: myapp:latest
   452→        command: ["./migrate.sh"]
   453→      restartPolicy: Never
   454→---
   455→apiVersion: batch/v1
   456→kind: Job
   457→metadata:
   458→  name: smoke-test
   459→  annotations:
   460→    argocd.argoproj.io/hook: PostSync
   461→    argocd.argoproj.io/hook-delete-policy: BeforeHookCreation
   462→    argocd.argoproj.io/sync-wave: "5"
   463→spec:
   464→  template:
   465→    spec:
   466→      containers:
   467→      - name: test
   468→        image: curlimages/curl:latest
   469→        command: ["curl", "http://myapp/health"]
   470→      restartPolicy: Never
   471→```
   472→
   473→### SSO Configuration
   474→
   475→**Dex with GitHub:**
   476→```yaml
   477→apiVersion: v1
   478→kind: ConfigMap
   479→metadata:
   480→  name: argocd-cm
   481→  namespace: argocd
   482→data:
   483→  url: https://argocd.example.com
   484→  dex.config: |
   485→    connectors:
   486→    - type: github
   487→      id: github
   488→      name: GitHub
   489→      config:
   490→        clientID: $dex.github.clientId
   491→        clientSecret: $dex.github.clientSecret
   492→        orgs:
   493→        - name: myorg
   494→          teams:
   495→          - platform-team
   496→          - developers
   497→---
   498→apiVersion: v1
   499→kind: ConfigMap
   500→metadata:
   501→  name: argocd-rbac-cm
   502→  namespace: argocd
   503→data:
   504→  policy.default: role:readonly
   505→  policy.csv: |
   506→    # Admins have full access
   507→    g, myorg:platform-team, role:admin
   508→
   509→    # Developers can sync apps
   510→    g, myorg:developers, role:developer
   511→
   512→    # Developer role definition
   513→    p, role:developer, applications, get, */*, allow
   514→    p, role:developer, applications, sync, */*, allow
   515→    p, role:developer, repositories, get, *, allow
   516→    p, role:developer, projects, get, *, allow
   517→
   518→  scopes: '[groups, email]'
   519→```
   520→
   521→### Health Checks
   522→
   523→**Custom Health Check:**
   524→```yaml
   525→apiVersion: v1
   526→kind: ConfigMap
   527→metadata:
   528→  name: argocd-cm
   529→  namespace: argocd
   530→data:
   531→  resource.customizations.health.argoproj.io_Rollout: |
   532→    hs = {}
   533→    if obj.status ~= nil then
   534→      if obj.status.conditions ~= nil then
   535→        for i, condition in ipairs(obj.status.conditions) do
   536→          if condition.type == "Progressing" and condition.reason == "RolloutCompleted" then
   537→            hs.status = "Healthy"
   538→            hs.message = "Rollout completed"
   539→            return hs
   540→          end
   541→        end
   542→      end
   543→    end
   544→    hs.status = "Progressing"
   545→    hs.message = "Rollout in progress"
   546→    return hs
   547→```
   548→
   549→## argocd CLI Commands
   550→
   551→**Application Management:**
   552→```bash
   553→# Create application
   554→argocd app create myapp \
   555→  --repo https://github.com/myorg/myapp \
   556→  --path k8s/overlays/production \
   557→  --dest-server https://kubernetes.default.svc \
   558→  --dest-namespace production
   559→
   560→# List applications
   561→argocd app list
   562→argocd app list -o wide
   563→
   564→# Get application details
   565→argocd app get myapp
   566→argocd app get myapp --refresh
   567→
   568→# Sync application
   569→argocd app sync myapp
   570→argocd app sync myapp --prune
   571→argocd app sync myapp --dry-run
   572→argocd app sync myapp --force
   573→
   574→# Rollback
   575→argocd app rollback myapp
   576→
   577→# Delete application
   578→argocd app delete myapp
   579→argocd app delete myapp --cascade=false  # Keep resources
   580→```
   581→
   582→**Repository Management:**
   583→```bash
   584→# Add repository
   585→argocd repo add https://github.com/myorg/myapp \
   586→  --username myuser \
   587→  --password mytoken
   588→
   589→# List repositories
   590→argocd repo list
   591→
   592→# Remove repository
   593→argocd repo rm https://github.com/myorg/myapp
   594→```
   595→
   596→**Cluster Management:**
   597→```bash
   598→# Add cluster
   599→argocd cluster add my-cluster-context
   600→
   601→# List clusters
   602→argocd cluster list
   603→
   604→# Remove cluster
   605→argocd cluster rm https://cluster.example.com
   606→```
   607→
   608→**Project Management:**
   609→```bash
   610→# Create project
   611→argocd proj create production
   612→
   613→# Add repository to project
   614→argocd proj add-source production https://github.com/myorg/*
   615→
   616→# Add destination to project
   617→argocd proj add-destination production \
   618→  https://kubernetes.default.svc \
   619→  production
   620→
   621→# List projects
   622→argocd proj list
   623→
   624→# Get project details
   625→argocd proj get production
   626→```
   627→
   628→## Best Practices
   629→
   630→### 1. Use AppProjects
   631→```yaml
   632→# Separate projects by team/environment
   633→- production
   634→- staging
   635→- development
   636→```
   637→
   638→### 2. Enable Auto-Sync with Pruning
   639→```yaml
   640→syncPolicy:
   641→  automated:
   642→    prune: true
   643→    selfHeal: true
   644→```
   645→
   646→### 3. Use Sync Waves
   647→```yaml
   648→annotations:
   649→  argocd.argoproj.io/sync-wave: "1"  # Deploy order
   650→```
   651→
   652→### 4. Implement Health Checks
   653→```yaml
   654→# Custom health checks for CRDs
   655→resource.customizations.health.<group>_<kind>
   656→```
   657→
   658→### 5. Use Sync Windows
   659→```yaml
   660→# Control deployment times
   661→syncWindows:
   662→- kind: allow
   663→  schedule: '0 9 * * 1-5'  # Business hours
   664→  duration: 8h
   665→```
   666→
   667→### 6. Enable Notifications
   668→```bash
   669→# Slack, Teams, email notifications
   670→argocd admin notifications controller
   671→```
   672→
   673→### 7. Use ApplicationSets
   674→```yaml
   675→# Manage multiple apps declaratively
   676→kind: ApplicationSet
   677→```
   678→
   679→## Anti-Patterns
   680→
   681→**1. No Resource Pruning:**
   682→```yaml
   683→# BAD: Orphaned resources
   684→automated: {}
   685→
   686→# GOOD: Enable pruning
   687→automated:
   688→  prune: true
   689→```
   690→
   691→**2. Manual Sync Only:**
   692→```yaml
   693→# BAD: Requires manual intervention
   694→syncPolicy: {}
   695→
   696→# GOOD: Automated sync
   697→syncPolicy:
   698→  automated:
   699→    prune: true
   700→    selfHeal: true
   701→```
   702→
   703→**3. Single Giant Application:**
   704→```yaml
   705→# BAD: One app for everything
   706→# GOOD: Separate apps by component/service
   707→```
   708→
   709→**4. No RBAC:**
   710→```yaml
   711→# GOOD: Always implement project-level RBAC
   712→roles:
   713→- name: developer
   714→  policies:
   715→  - p, proj:prod:dev, applications, sync, prod/*, allow
   716→```
   717→
   718→## Approach
   719→
   720→When implementing ArgoCD:
   721→
   722→1. **Start Simple**: Deploy one application first
   723→2. **GitOps Everything**: All config in Git
   724→3. **Automate**: Enable auto-sync and self-heal
   725→4. **Organize**: Use AppProjects for isolation
   726→5. **RBAC**: Implement least-privilege access
   727→6. **Monitor**: Set up notifications and alerts
   728→7. **Scale**: Use ApplicationSets for multi-cluster/multi-env
   729→8. **Security**: Enable SSO and audit logging
   730→
   731→Always design GitOps workflows that are declarative, auditable, and automated following cloud-native principles.
   732→
   733→## Resources
   734→
   735→- ArgoCD Documentation: https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/
   736→- GitOps Principles: https://opengitops.dev/
   737→- ApplicationSet: https://argocd-applicationset.readthedocs.io/
   738→- ArgoCD Notifications: https://argocd-notifications.readthedocs.io/
   739→

    16→    namespace: micro-commerce
    17→  syncPolicy:
    18→    automated:
    19→      selfHeal: true
    20→      prune: true
    21→    syncOptions:
    22→    - CreateNamespace=true
    23→    retry:
    24→      limit: 5
    25→      backoff:
    26→        duration: 5s
    27→        factor: 2
    28→        maxDuration: 3m
    29→

1→#!/usr/bin/env bash
     2→set -euo pipefail
     3→
     4→SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
     5→PROJECT_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"
     6→CLUSTER_NAME="micro-commerce"
     7→NAMESPACE="micro-commerce"
     8→SEALED_SECRETS_VERSION="v0.27.3"
     9→ARGOCD_VERSION="v3.3.2"
    10→
    11→# Color output
    12→GREEN='\033[0;32m'
    13→YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
    14→RED='\033[0;31m'
    15→NC='\033[0m' # No Color
    16→
    17→info() { echo -e "${GREEN}[INFO]${NC} $*"; }
    18→warn() { echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} $*"; }
    19→error() { echo -e "${RED}[ERROR]${NC} $*"; }
    20→
    21→# --- Pre-flight: Check required CLI tools ---
    22→check_prerequisites() {
    23→  local missing=false
    24→  for cmd in kind kubectl kubeseal docker; do
    25→    if ! command -v "$cmd" &>/dev/null; then
    26→      error "Required tool '$cmd' not found. Please install it before running this script."
    27→      missing=true
    28→    fi
    29→  done
    30→  if [ "$missing" = true ]; then
    31→    error "Install missing tools:"
    32→    error "  kind:      https://kind.sigs.k8s.io/docs/user/quick-start/#installation"
    33→    error "  kubectl:   https://kubernetes.io/docs/tasks/tools/"
    34→    error "  kubeseal:  https://github.com/bitnami-labs/sealed-secrets#kubeseal"
    35→    error "  docker:    https://docs.docker.com/get-docker/"
    36→    exit 1
    37→  fi
    38→  info "All required tools found."
    39→}
    40→
    41→check_prerequisites
    42→
    43→# --- Trap handler: Print cleanup guidance on failure ---
    44→cleanup_on_error() {
    45→  echo ""
    46→  error "Bootstrap failed! To clean up:"
    47→  error "  kind delete cluster --name ${CLUSTER_NAME}"
    48→  error "  kubectl config unset contexts.kind-${CLUSTER_NAME}"
    49→  echo ""
    50→  error "To retry, run this script again."
    51→}
    52→
    53→trap cleanup_on_error ERR
    54→
    55→# --- Step 1: Create kind cluster ---
    56→if kind get clusters 2>/dev/null | grep -q "^${CLUSTER_NAME}$"; then
    57→  info "Cluster '${CLUSTER_NAME}' already exists, skipping creation."
    58→else
    59→  info "Creating kind cluster '${CLUSTER_NAME}'..."
    60→  kind create cluster --name "$CLUSTER_NAME" --config "$SCRIPT_DIR/kind-config.yaml"
    61→fi
    62→
    63→# --- Step 2: Verify kubectl context targets the kind cluster ---
    64→CURRENT_CONTEXT=$(kubectl config current-context 2>/dev/null || echo "")
    65→EXPECTED_CONTEXT="kind-${CLUSTER_NAME}"
    66→if [ "$CURRENT_CONTEXT" != "$EXPECTED_CONTEXT" ]; then
    67→  error "kubectl context is '${CURRENT_CONTEXT}' but expected '${EXPECTED_CONTEXT}'"
    68→  error "This script only runs against the local kind cluster."
    69→  error "Switch context: kubectl config use-context ${EXPECTED_CONTEXT}"
    70→  exit 1
    71→fi
    72→info "kubectl context verified: ${EXPECTED_CONTEXT}"
    73→kubectl config use-context "kind-${CLUSTER_NAME}"
    74→
    75→# --- Step 3: Install SealedSecrets controller ---
    76→info "Installing SealedSecrets controller ${SEALED_SECRETS_VERSION}..."
    77→kubectl apply -f "https://github.com/bitnami-labs/sealed-secrets/releases/download/${SEALED_SECRETS_VERSION}/controller.yaml"
    78→
    79→# --- Step 4: Wait for SealedSecrets controller ---
    80→info "Waiting for SealedSecrets controller to be ready..."
    81→kubectl rollout status deployment/sealed-secrets-controller -n kube-system --timeout=120s
    82→
    83→# --- Step 5: Create namespace ---
    84→info "Creating namespace '${NAMESPACE}'..."
    85→kubectl create namespace "$NAMESPACE" --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f -
    86→
    87→# --- Step 6: Seal dev secrets and apply directly ---
    88→info "Sealing dev secrets..."
    89→
    90→seal_secret() {
    91→  local name="$1"
    92→  local output="$2"
    93→  shift 2
    94→  # Remaining args are --from-literal pairs
    95→
    96→  kubectl create secret generic "$name" \
    97→    --namespace "$NAMESPACE" \
    98→    "$@" \
    99→    --dry-run=client -o yaml | \
   100→  kubeseal \
   101→    --controller-name=sealed-secrets-controller \
   102→    --controller-namespace=kube-system \
   103→    --format yaml > "$output"
   104→
   105→  info "  Sealed: $name -> $output"
   106→}
   107→
   108→seal_secret "postgres-credentials" \
   109→  "$SCRIPT_DIR/base/postgres/sealed-secret.yaml" \
   110→  --from-literal=username=postgres \
   111→  --from-literal=password=postgres
   112→
   113→seal_secret "rabbitmq-credentials" \
   114→  "$SCRIPT_DIR/base/rabbitmq/sealed-secret.yaml" \
   115→  --from-literal=username=guest \
   116→  --from-literal=password=guest
   117→
   118→seal_secret "keycloak-credentials" \
   119→  "$SCRIPT_DIR/base/keycloak/sealed-secret.yaml" \
   120→  --from-literal=admin-username=admin \
   121→  --from-literal=admin-password=admin
   122→
   123→seal_secret "web-secrets" \
   124→  "$SCRIPT_DIR/base/web/sealed-secret.yaml" \
   125→  --from-literal=auth-secret=k8s-dev-auth-secret-change-in-production \
   126→  --from-literal=keycloak-client-secret=nextjs-app-secret
   127→
   128→info "Applying sealed secrets..."
   129→kubectl apply -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/base/postgres/sealed-secret.yaml"
   130→kubectl apply -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/base/rabbitmq/sealed-secret.yaml"
   131→kubectl apply -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/base/keycloak/sealed-secret.yaml"
   132→kubectl apply -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/base/web/sealed-secret.yaml"
   133→
   134→# --- Step 7: Install ArgoCD ---
   135→info "Installing ArgoCD ${ARGOCD_VERSION}..."
   136→kubectl create namespace argocd --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f -
   137→kubectl apply -n argocd --server-side --force-conflicts \
   138→  -f "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/argoproj/argo-cd/${ARGOCD_VERSION}/manifests/install.yaml"
   139→
   140→# --- Step 8: Wait for ArgoCD to be ready ---
   141→info "Waiting for ArgoCD to be ready..."
   142→kubectl rollout status deployment argocd-server -n argocd --timeout=120s
   143→kubectl rollout status deployment argocd-repo-server -n argocd --timeout=120s
   144→kubectl rollout status deployment argocd-applicationset-controller -n argocd --timeout=120s
   145→
   146→# --- Step 9: Configure ArgoCD for local access ---
   147→info "Configuring ArgoCD for local access..."
   148→kubectl apply -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/argocd/argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml"
   149→kubectl rollout restart deployment argocd-server -n argocd
   150→kubectl rollout status deployment argocd-server -n argocd --timeout=120s
   151→kubectl apply -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/argocd/argocd-server-nodeport.yaml"
   152→
   153→# --- Step 10: Build application container images ---
   154→info "Building application container images..."
   155→
   156→info "  Building ApiService..."
   157→dotnet publish "$PROJECT_ROOT/src/MicroCommerce.ApiService/MicroCommerce.ApiService.csproj" \
   158→  /t:PublishContainer \
   159→  -p:ContainerRegistry="" \
   160→  -p:ContainerRepository=apiservice \
   161→  -p:ContainerImageTag=dev \
   162→  --nologo -v quiet
   163→
   164→info "  Building Gateway..."
   165→dotnet publish "$PROJECT_ROOT/src/MicroCommerce.Gateway/MicroCommerce.Gateway.csproj" \
   166→  /t:PublishContainer \
   167→  -p:ContainerRegistry="" \
   168→  -p:ContainerRepository=gateway \
   169→  -p:ContainerImageTag=dev \
   170→  --nologo -v quiet
   171→
   172→info "  Building Web..."
   173→docker build \
   174→  -f "$PROJECT_ROOT/src/MicroCommerce.Web/Dockerfile" \
   175→  -t web:dev \
   176→  "$PROJECT_ROOT/src/MicroCommerce.Web" \
   177→  --quiet
   178→
   179→# --- Step 11: Load images into kind ---
   180→info "Loading images into kind cluster..."
   181→kind load docker-image apiservice:dev --name "$CLUSTER_NAME"
   182→kind load docker-image gateway:dev --name "$CLUSTER_NAME"
   183→kind load docker-image web:dev --name "$CLUSTER_NAME"
   184→
   185→# --- Step 12: Apply ArgoCD root app-of-apps ---
   186→info "Applying ArgoCD root app-of-apps..."
   187→kubectl apply -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/argocd/root-app.yaml"
   188→
   189→# --- Step 13: Wait for ArgoCD to sync all applications ---
   190→info "Waiting for ArgoCD to sync all applications..."
   191→sleep 10
   192→
   193→info "Waiting for PostgreSQL..."
   194→kubectl wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=postgres -n "$NAMESPACE" --timeout=120s
   195→
   196→info "Waiting for RabbitMQ..."
   197→kubectl wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=rabbitmq -n "$NAMESPACE" --timeout=120s
   198→
   199→info "Waiting for Keycloak (may take up to 3 minutes for realm import)..."
   200→kubectl wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=keycloak -n "$NAMESPACE" --timeout=180s
   201→
   202→info "Waiting for ApiService (may take up to 3 minutes for first-boot migrations)..."
   203→kubectl wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=apiservice -n "$NAMESPACE" --timeout=180s
   204→
   205→info "Waiting for Gateway..."
   206→kubectl wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=gateway -n "$NAMESPACE" --timeout=120s
   207→
   208→info "Waiting for Web..."
   209→kubectl wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=web -n "$NAMESPACE" --timeout=120s
   210→
   211→info "Waiting for OTEL Collector..."
   212→kubectl wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=otel-collector -n "$NAMESPACE" --timeout=120s
   213→
   214→info "Waiting for Aspire Dashboard..."
   215→kubectl wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=aspire-dashboard -n "$NAMESPACE" --timeout=120s
   216→
   217→# --- Step 14: Print access info ---
   218→ARGOCD_PASSWORD=$(kubectl -n argocd get secret argocd-initial-admin-secret \
   219→  -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 --decode)
   220→
   221→echo ""
   222→info "Full stack ready!"
   223→echo ""
   224→echo "Access points:"
   225→echo "  PostgreSQL:          localhost:35432 (user: postgres, pass: postgres, db: appdb)"
   226→echo "  RabbitMQ Management: http://localhost:35672 (user: guest, pass: guest)"
   227→echo "  Keycloak Admin:      http://localhost:38080 (user: admin, pass: admin)"
   228→echo "  Gateway (API):       http://localhost:38800"
   229→echo "  ArgoCD UI:           http://localhost:38443 (user: admin, pass: ${ARGOCD_PASSWORD})"
   230→echo "  Aspire Dashboard:    http://localhost:38888"
   231→echo ""
   232→echo "Storefront: http://localhost:38800 (via Gateway)"
   233→echo ""
   234→echo "Useful commands:"
   235→echo "  kubectl get pods -n ${NAMESPACE}"
   236→echo "  kubectl get applications -n argocd"
   237→echo "  kubectl logs -f deployment/apiservice -n ${NAMESPACE}"
   238→echo "  kubectl logs -f deployment/gateway -n ${NAMESPACE}"
   239→echo "  kubectl logs -f deployment/web -n ${NAMESPACE}"
   240→echo "  kind delete cluster --name ${CLUSTER_NAME}"
   241→

# Phase 35 Plan 01: ArgoCD GitOps Best Practices Summary

**Dedicated AppProject with sync wave ordering, root app retry strategy, and StatefulSet ignoreDifferences for scoped resilient GitOps deployments**

## Performance

- **Duration:** 2 min
- **Started:** 2026-03-08T16:33:29Z
- **Completed:** 2026-03-08T16:35:00Z
- **Tasks:** 2
- **Files modified:** 11

## Accomplishments
- Created dedicated micro-commerce AppProject restricting sourceRepos and destination namespaces
- Added sync-wave annotations to all 9 manifests enforcing infrastructure-before-apps ordering
- Added retry strategy to root app matching child app configuration (limit 5, 5s/factor 2/max 3m)
- Added ignoreDifferences for PostgreSQL and RabbitMQ StatefulSet volumeClaimTemplates with RespectIgnoreDifferences
- Updated bootstrap script to apply AppProject before root app

## Task Commits

Each task was committed atomically:

1. **Task 1: Create AppProject and add sync waves, retry, ignoreDifferences** - `4e8228d3` (feat)
2. **Task 2: Update bootstrap script to apply AppProject before root app** - `46213eea` (feat)

## Files Created/Modified
- `infra/k8s/argocd/project.yaml` - Dedicated AppProject with restricted sourceRepos and destinations
- `infra/k8s/argocd/root-app.yaml` - Added project ref, sync-wave "0", retry strategy
- `infra/k8s/argocd/apps/postgres.yaml` - Sync-wave "1", project ref, ignoreDifferences, RespectIgnoreDifferences
- `infra/k8s/argocd/apps/rabbitmq.yaml` - Sync-wave "2", project ref, ignoreDifferences, RespectIgnoreDifferences
- `infra/k8s/argocd/apps/keycloak.yaml` - Sync-wave "2", project ref
- `infra/k8s/argocd/apps/apiservice.yaml` - Sync-wave "3", project ref
- `infra/k8s/argocd/apps/gateway.yaml` - Sync-wave "4", project ref
- `infra/k8s/argocd/apps/web.yaml` - Sync-wave "5", project ref
- `infra/k8s/argocd/apps/otel-collector.yaml` - Sync-wave "6", project ref
- `infra/k8s/argocd/apps/aspire-dashboard.yaml` - Sync-wave "6", project ref
- `infra/k8s/bootstrap.sh` - Apply project.yaml before root-app.yaml in Step 12

## Decisions Made
- Sync wave ordering: postgres=1, rabbitmq/keycloak=2, apiservice=3, gateway=4, web=5, otel/aspire=6
- AppProject allows both micro-commerce and argocd namespaces (argocd needed for child Application resources)
- clusterResourceWhitelist limited to Namespace kind only (required by CreateNamespace=true)
- ignoreDifferences applied to both postgres and rabbitmq StatefulSets for volumeClaimTemplates drift

## Deviations from Plan

None - plan executed exactly as written.

## Issues Encountered

None.

## User Setup Required

None - no external service configuration required.

## Next Phase Readiness
- All ArgoCD applications now scoped to dedicated AppProject
- Sync wave ordering ensures correct deployment sequence
- Ready for further GitOps best practices in Plan 02

---
*Phase: 35-argocd-gitops-best-practices*
